epigraph.quote: Siri, the new German au pair, moved into Thomas's + Peter's tent in the middle of the night, + Thomas obligingly moved out into hers.

moments.quote: Good weather, despite the forecast. People paragliding near a disused railway.
The proportions are lovely, like Bath, but not so large + awe-inspiring.
We camped across the road from an old church which only had a service in the afternoon.
